# VeriWorkly Portfolio

> Build, customize, and publish a professional, high-fidelity developer or designer portfolio website in minutes on your own VeriWorkly subdomain.

## Core Architecture
- **Single Content Source**: User data (identity, work experience, education, projects, skills, services, testimonials, awards) is completely separated from the presentation layer.
- **Dynamic Template Registry**: Switch visual templates at any time with zero data migration or loss.
- **Dynamic OG Image Generation**: Social previews are rendered on the server-side per-template at `https://veriworkly.com/api/template/[templateId]/og`, creating unique brand experiences for Signal and Atelier subdomains.

## Predefined Templates
- **Signal**: Proof-first, modern-minimal design tailored for software engineers.
  - **Aesthetics**: Warm light green paper background (`#f1efe7`), dark slate pine text (`#182b25`), vibrant green accent (`#139a75`), monospace details, subtle grids, and explicit proof metrics.
- **Atelier**: Typography-heavy, expressive, and editorial design tailored for designers and creative developers.
  - **Aesthetics**: Warm ochre parchment background (`#ebd5b3`), rich dark chocolate ink text (`#3b2c21`), terracotta rust red (`#cd563f`), ochre gold (`#e7b850`), slate blue (`#4776a3`), and overlapping abstract circular visual art.

## API & Metadata Infrastructure
- **Dynamic Social Previews**: Social card generation routes available at:
  - Signal: `https://veriworkly.com/api/template/signal/og?name=...&headline=...&bio=...&availability=...&location=...&subdomain=...`
  - Atelier: `https://veriworkly.com/api/template/atelier/og?name=...&headline=...&bio=...&location=...&subdomain=...`
- **Structured Data**: Automatic ProfilePage JSON-LD schema generation with personal, occupational, and `sameAs` social links.
